hero.desc: Strengthening civil society in partnership with 40+ NGOs in Fergana and Tashkent regions — 2025–2027.

items.title: Mapping and Analysis
items.desc: In-depth study and analysis of the needs of 40 women's NGOs.

items.title: Partnership Network
items.desc: Creating a powerful platform for experience sharing and collaboration.

items.title: Capacity Building
items.desc: Practical training on leadership and strategic planning.

items.title: Advocacy
items.desc: Promoting gender equality and social initiatives at the national level.

items.title: Practical Toolkit
items.desc: Preparation and distribution of strategic guides and reference materials.

items.title: Sustainable Development
items.desc: Elevating and strengthening local initiatives to the national level.

reels.title: Project
reels.subtitle: Short video reports in Instagram format
reels.label: YouTube Shorts

impact.label: Impact Metrics
impact.desc: The project is reaching the end of Phase 3 (Milestone 3). We have united 40 organizations that are now driving social change in their regions.
impact.quote: This project not only provides us with the necessary knowledge and skills but also helps build a strong community through mutual support.

footer.org: Developing civil society in Uzbekistan with the support of the UN Democracy Fund (UNDEF).
footer.ctaDesc: Join our project and be part of the change.

modal.name: Your Name
modal.sentDesc: We will get back to you shortly.

items.title: Outcome 1: Needs and Network
items.heading: Strengthening Capacity
activities: Creating a network of 40 NGOs in Tashkent and Fergana.
Developing a strategic plan for capacity building.
Identifying advocacy directions through a network round table.

items.title: Outcome 2: Knowledge and Mentorship
items.heading: Enhancing Knowledge and Skills
activities: Training on Leadership, Fundraising, and Project Writing.
Specialized training programs for NGOs and initiative groups.
Developing joint partnership projects between organizations.

items.title: II Round Table (May 2026)
items.heading: Presentation of Results
activities: Presentation of project results and achievements.
Analysis of network activities and discussion of challenges.
Defining paths for future sustainability and development.

items.title: Outcome 3: Sustainability and Engagement
items.heading: Sustainable Partnership and Advocacy
activities: Implementing small pilot initiatives at the local level.
Joint advocacy events at regional and network levels.
Expanding the network through regular meetings.
Presentation of final results and future plans.

project_team.description: Behind our success stands a strong and united team. Every member is an expert in their field and a creator of innovative ideas.
project_team.member_quote: "Every woman can be at the center of change in her society." An integral part of our team and a proactive leader.
